TravelClient.title: TravelClient
TravelClient.description: Stored user/traveler profiles in Travel Bharat

id.description: Unique identifier of the traveler user

interest.description: Travel vibe / category interest (e.g., Heritage, Nature, Religious, Adventure, All)

companion.description: Companion mode (e.g., Solo Traveller, Couple, Family, Group Tour)

loginMethod.description: Authentication method used (e.g., Email, Google, Facebook, Signup)

phone.description: Optional contact number of the traveler
